hero.title:
Explore Skiathos
by Sea
hero.subtitle: Rent a self-drive boat, book an exclusive private tour, or jump on a 24/7 transfer. The Aegean is waiting.

whyUs.title: Curated Fleet, Guaranteed Prices
whyUs.desc: We hand-pick every boat, service, and tour we offer. The price and availability you get from us is the price and availability of the operator — we honor every booking request we send out.

whyUs.title: No Hidden Fees, No Middlemen
whyUs.desc: No platform commissions, no third-party markups, no surprise charges. We work directly with each operator's booking system and pass the real price through to you.

whyUs.title: One Team, Fully Responsible
whyUs.desc: We are accountable for your booking from the first message to the day you step off the boat. One point of contact, no run-around between companies.

whyUs.title: Mix & Match Any Service
whyUs.desc: Boat rental in the morning, a private tour in the afternoon, a transfer at midnight — combine any of our services into one seamless plan. If it's available, we'll put it together for you.

whyUs.title: Direct Access, Not a Broker
whyUs.desc: We don't act as an agent adding a layer between you and the business. We eliminate that layer — connecting you straight to the operator while we handle every detail of the coordination.

whyUs.title: Support Throughout Your Trip
whyUs.desc: We don't disappear after you click 'book'. We support you throughout the entire experience — itinerary changes, weather, special requests, last-minute add-ons — we're on the line.

seo.defaultTitle: Skiathos Boat Rental | Self-Drive, Private Tours & Transfer
seo.defaultDescription: Rent a boat in Skiathos directly from the island's largest fleet. No license needed for 30HP boats. Private tours, 24/7 transfer, and watersports. Book directly — no platform fees.
